behaviors.description: A file placed inside a subdirectory of the watched root is processed, not only files placed directly in the root directory.
behaviors.justification: wiring=yes: "processed, not only files placed directly in the root directory" (watcher -> pipeline plumbing). real_infra=yes: "file placed inside a subdirectory of the watched root" (real filesystem watch semantics). model_judgment=no: no model/content evaluation required. multi_step_agentic=no: no autonomous planning loop required. Deterministic map => real_infra=yes and higher conditions are no => System.
behaviors.test_description: Create watched root with nested subdirectory, drop file into subdirectory, assert daemon processes it and writes expected output once.

behaviors.description: The deduplication logic correctly discards a second processing request for the same file path within a configurable time window.
behaviors.justification: wiring=yes: "deduplication logic correctly discards a second processing request" (interaction between event intake and dedup window logic). real_infra=no: can be validated with injected requests + controllable clock, no OS-specific behavior required. model_judgment=no: no model output quality judgment. multi_step_agentic=no: no multi-step autonomy. Deterministic map => wiring=yes only => Integration.
behaviors.test_description: Send two processing requests for identical path within configured window; assert only first is executed. Optionally verify second is accepted after window expires.

behaviors.description: When the operating system emits multiple filesystem events for a single file write, the daemon processes the file exactly once.
behaviors.justification: wiring=yes: "processes the file exactly once" (event coalescing/idempotency path). real_infra=yes: "operating system emits multiple filesystem events" requires real FS event behavior. model_judgment=no: no semantic evaluation of model output. multi_step_agentic=no: no autonomous multi-step loop. Deterministic map => real_infra=yes => System.
behaviors.test_description: Trigger a single write that yields multiple OS fs events (or replay equivalent event burst against live watcher) and assert exactly one processing/output action.

behaviors.description: If the watched directory is removed and then recreated while the daemon is running, the daemon resumes watching the new directory without a restart.
behaviors.justification: wiring=yes: "daemon resumes watching ... without a restart" (watch lifecycle/rebind plumbing). real_infra=yes: "watched directory is removed and then recreated" is OS/filesystem lifecycle behavior. model_judgment=no: no model-content judgment. multi_step_agentic=no: no agentic planning. Deterministic map => real_infra=yes => System.
behaviors.test_description: Start daemon, delete watched directory, recreate it, add new file, assert daemon detects/processes new file without process restart.

behaviors.description: When multiple files arrive at the same time, they are processed in the order determined by their creation timestamps.
behaviors.justification: wiring=yes: "processed in the order determined by their creation timestamps" (queue ordering logic across arrivals). real_infra=yes: "creation timestamps" come from filesystem metadata/resolution characteristics. model_judgment=no: no model output interpretation required. multi_step_agentic=no: no autonomous multi-step planning. Deterministic map => real_infra=yes => System.
behaviors.test_description: Create multiple files with controlled/known creation times under concurrent arrival conditions; assert processing order matches creation timestamp ordering.

behaviors.description: A file that is still being written to when the arrival event fires is not picked up for processing until writing is complete.
behaviors.justification: wiring=yes: "not picked up for processing until writing is complete" (readiness gating in pipeline). real_infra=yes: "still being written to when the arrival event fires" depends on real write/event timing behavior. model_judgment=no: no model-content quality check. multi_step_agentic=no: no autonomous agent flow. Deterministic map => real_infra=yes => System.
behaviors.test_description: Begin slow/streamed write to file, emit/observe arrival event early, assert daemon delays processing until final write completion/close and then processes once.
